title: Lavish Home Sherpa Fleece Throw Blanket - 50x60-Inch Machine-Washable Reversible Throw - Fluffy Blankets for Couch, Chair, or Bed (Leopard)
availability_text: Only 8 left in stock (more on the way).
features: SHERPA BLANKET - Whether you are relaxing on the couch or in bed, this fleece blanket will help keep you cozy and warm. The fuzzy polyester material paired with the generous 50-inch by 60-inch size make this throw perfect for lounging and snuggling.

REVERSIBLE DESIGN - This cozy blanket features an elegant leopard print design that will complement any room. With white Sherpa fleece on one side and a pattern on the other, this fuzzy blanket is reversible to offer two looks to suit your mood.

GREAT GIFT - This warm blanket allows you to give the gift of coziness in any season. It makes a thoughtful birthday, Christmas, or housewarming present for a new home, but once you feel the soft fleece, you may want to buy one for yourself too.
EASY CARE - This soft blanket is conveniently machine-washable, so keeping it feeling cozy and fresh is easy. Simply wash the throw blanket for couch in cold water and tumble dry on low heat.
PRODUCT DETAILS - Materials: 100% Polyester, PV Fleece Face, and Sherpa Fleece Back. Dimensions: (L) 60" x (W) 50”. Color: Leopard Print.
description: The contemporary design of this animal print throw provides a distinctive, stylish look while providing comfort and warmth. 100 percent polyester makes for easy care and long lasting use at home or on the go Material: 100% Polyester. Pattern: Animal Print. Face Material: PV Fleece, Back Material: Sherpa Fleece. Dimensions: 50" x 60". Care Instructions: Wash in Cold Water and Tumble Dry on Low Heat.
